title: Core Post
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Core Post''' was one of the [[Bureau of Scouting and Exploration Services|New Republic Scout Service's]] two headquarters, in charge of NRSS' recordkeeping and continued funding. Located on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], it employed roughly 2,000 people and housed the [[Nova Core]], a club for outstanding scouts.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-03-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 8: Scouts]]''
